title: Jimmy John's menu — favorites + originals (calorie data for BroMenu)
html:
Jimmy John's menu page screenshot at 2 a.m. — Favorites (#15 Club Tuna, #16 Club Lulu, #17 Ultimate Porker, J.J.B.L.T., #14 Bootlegger Club, #13 Jimmy Cubano, #12 Beach Club) and Originals (#1 The Pepe through #6 The Veggie) with 8"/16" calorie pairs. Same data-collection sprint pattern as the Taco Bell scroll and snap session.

brotein · bromenu · fast food nutrition dataset · anabolic scoring
